item.title: v2.1.132
item.description: What's changed - Added CLAUDECODESESSIONID environment variable to the Bash tool subprocess environment, matching the sessionid passed to hooks - Added CLAUDECODEDISABLEALTERNATESCREEN=1 env var to opt out of the fullscreen alternate-screen renderer and keep the conversation in the terminal's native

item.title: v2.1.131
item.description: What's changed - Fixed VS Code extension failing to activate on Windows due to a hardcoded build path in the bundled SDK (createRequire polyfill bug) - Fixed Mantle endpoint authentication failing with missing x-api-key header

item.title: v2.1.129
item.description: What's changed - Added --plugin-url <url> flag to fetch a plugin .zip archive from a URL for the current session - Added CLAUDECODEFORCESYNCOUTPUT=1 env var to force-enable synchronized output on terminals that auto-detection misses (e.g. Emacs eat) - Added CLAUDECODEPACKAGEMANAGERAUTOUPDATE: when s

item.title: v2.1.128
item.description: What's changed - Bare /color (no args) now picks a random session color - /mcp now shows the tool count for connected servers and flags servers that connected with 0 tools - --plugin-dir now accepts .zip plugin archives in addition to directories - --channels now works with console (API key) authent

item.title: v2.1.126
item.description: What's changed - The /model picker now lists models from your gateway's /v1/models endpoint when ANTHROPICBASEURL points at an Anthropic-compatible gateway - - Added claude project purge [path] to delete all Claude Code state for a project (transcripts, tasks, file history, config entry) — supports

item.title: v2.1.123
item.description: What's changed - Fixed OAuth authentication failing with a 401 retry loop when CLAUDECODEDISABLEEXPERIMENTALBETAS=1 is set

item.title: v2.1.122
item.description: What's changed - Added ANTHROPICBEDROCKSERVICETIER environment variable to select a Bedrock service tier (default, flex, or priority), sent as the X-Amzn-Bedrock-Service-Tier header - Pasting a PR URL into the /resume search box now finds the session that created that PR (GitHub, GitHub Enterprise,

item.title: v2.1.121
item.description: What's changed - Added alwaysLoad option to MCP server config — when true, all tools from that server skip tool-search deferral and are always available - Added claude plugin prune to remove orphaned auto-installed plugin dependencies; plugin uninstall --prune cascades - Added a type-to-filter searc
